mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interior (c_id, c_kind, c_name, i_tag, i_text) VALUES ( #{c_id}, #{c_kind}, #{c_name}, #{i_tag}, #{i_text})

SELECT SEQ_I_EXAMPLE_INDEX.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO i_example (c_id, c_name, c_kind, ie_tag, ie_tag2, ie_content, ie_index) VALUES ( #{c_id}, #{c_name}, #{c_kind}, #{ie_tag}, #{ie_tag2}, #{ie_content}, #{ie_index})

INSERT INTO booking (id, c_id, c_kind, c_name, b_kind, b_long, b_date, b_status, b_content, b_answer) VALUES ( #{id}, #{c_id}, #{c_kind}, #{c_name}, #{b_kind}, #{b_long}, #{b_date}, #{b_status}, #{b_content}, #{b_answer})
INSERT INTO invoice (id, c_id, c_kind, c_name, b_createdDate, invoice_no, invoice_kind) VALUES ( #{id}, #{c_id}, #{c_kind}, #{c_name}, #{b_createdDate}, #{invoice_no}, #{invoice_kind})

INSERT ALL
INTO invoice_detail (id, c_id,c_kind,c_name,b_createdDate,invoice_no,invoice_kind,invoice_text,invoice_qty,invoice_price) VALUES (#{id}, #{c_id},#{c_kind},#{c_name},#{b_createdDate},#{invoice_no},#{invoice_kind},#{item.invoice_text}, #{item.invoice_qty},#{item.invoice_price})
SELECT * FROM DUAL

INSERT INTO invoice_detail (id, c_id, c_kind, c_name, b_createddate, invoice_no, invoice_text, invoice_qty, invoice_price) VALUES ( #{id}, #{c_id}, #{c_kind}, #{c_name}, #{b_createdDate}, #{invoice_no}, #{invoice_text}, #{invoice_qty}, #{invoice_price})

INSERT INTO i_review (id, c_id, c_kind, c_name, b_createddate, invoice_no, invoice_kind, ir_content) VALUES ( #{id}, #{c_id}, #{c_kind}, #{c_name}, #{b_createdDate}, #{invoice_no}, #{invoice_kind}, #{ir_content})
mapper.select: SELECT c_id, c_kind, c_name, c_tel, c_addr, c_info, c_boss FROM company WHERE c_kind LIKE 'interior'
SELECT c_id, c_kind, c_name, i_tag, i_text FROM interior

SELECT ir.id, ir.b_createddate, ir.c_id, ir.c_kind, ir.c_name, ir.invoice_no, ir.invoice_kind, ir.ir_content, ir.ir_createddate,
c.c_addr, c.c_tel, c.c_boss, c.c_info
FROM i_review ir JOIN company c ON ir.c_id = c.c_id AND ir.c_kind = c.c_kind AND ir.c_name = c.c_name

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM rnum, data.* FROM ( SELECT ir.id, ir.b_createddate, ir.c_id, ir.c_kind, ir.c_name, ir.invoice_no, ir.invoice_kind, ir.ir_content, ir.ir_createddate, c.c_addr, c.c_tel, c.c_boss, c.c_info FROM i_review ir JOIN company c ON ir.c_id = c.c_id AND ir.c_kind = c.c_kind AND ir.c_name = c.c_name ORDER BY ir.ir_createddate DESC ) data WHERE ROWNUM <= #{end} ) WHERE rnum >= #{start}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM i_review ir JOIN company c ON ir.c_id = c.c_id AND ir.c_kind = c.c_kind AND ir.c_name = c.c_name

SELECT ie.c_id, ie.c_kind, ie.c_name, ie.ie_content, ie.ie_tag, ie.ie_tag2, ie_index,
c.c_addr, c.c_tel, c.c_boss, c.c_info
FROM i_example ie JOIN company c ON ie.c_id = c.c_id AND ie.c_kind = c.c_kind AND ie.c_name = c.c_name

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM i_example ie JOIN company c ON ie.c_id = c.c_id AND ie.c_kind = c.c_kind AND ie.c_name = c.c_name WHERE 1 = 1
AND ie.ie_tag = #{filterType} AND ie.ie_tag2 = #{filterValue}
SELECT id, b_createddate, c_id, c_kind, c_name, b_kind, b_long, b_date, b_status, b_content, b_answer FROM booking
mapper.update:
UPDATE i_example
ie_content = #{ie_content},
ie_tag = #{ie_tag},
ie_tag2 = #{ie_tag2},
WHERE IE_INDEX = #{ie_index}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM BOOKING
AND c_id = #{c_id} AND B_STATUS = 'working' or B_STATUS = 'done' or B_STATUS = 'cancel'
